system.description:
### Tier 3 Horde A buzzing cloud of mechanical insects that seeks to sting and paralyze targets for harvest. Motives & Tactics: Paralyze, overwhelm

#### Features Collector Paralysis - Passive: Any target hit by the Seeker Swarm must make a Strength Reaction Roll. On a failure, they gain the Restrained condition. While Restrained this way, they cannot gain or spend Hope.

Ominous Buzzing - Action: The swarm fills a zone (Close range). All targets in the zone must make an Instinct Roll (Difficulty 17). On a failure, they mark 2 Stress and are Vulnerable.

Flight - Passive: The Swarm can move over obstacles and ignore difficult terrain. It has Advantage on Agility-based rolls.

}}
